Name: YouTube Subscriber Counter Desk Display
Short description: The YouTube Subscriber Counter is a tiny, always-on desk display that shows your live YouTube subscribers over Wi-Fi — big numbers, a next-milestone bar, and a daily-change ticker. No laptop, app, or phone. Ships pre-flashed with a 3D-printed stand.
Description:
The YouTube Subscriber Counter puts your live YouTube subscribers right on your desk. It is a tiny, always-on Wi-Fi display with big readable numbers, a next-milestone progress bar, and a daily-change ticker — so every bit of growth feels real. No laptop, no app, no phone.

What your YouTube Subscriber Counter shows

  • SUBSCRIBERS — your live count, big and readable
  • VIEWS and VIDEOS — your channel totals at a glance
  • NEXT MILESTONE — a progress bar to your next round number (10K, 100K, 1M...)
  • "+N today" — how much you have gained since it started watching
  • Refreshes automatically every minute over Wi-Fi
  • One-tap brightness and light/dark toggle

What you get

  • A pre-flashed Social Meter, ready to set up
  • A USB-C power cable
  • A 3D-printed desk stand
  • A printed setup card with a QR code to the step-by-step guide
  • Optional battery for cord-free placement

Setting up your YouTube Subscriber Counter

Plug in -> join the device's Wi-Fi from your phone -> open the setup page -> pick YouTube and enter your channel (handle or ID), plus a free API key -> enter your home Wi-Fi. Done. Our guided page walks you through it in about two minutes.

What you need

  • Your channel (handle or ID)
  • A free YouTube Data API key (Google Cloud > enable YouTube Data API v3 > copy the key — about 2 minutes; we show you exactly how)
  • 2.4 GHz home Wi-Fi (WPA2)

Private by design. Your details stay on the device — never uploaded to us or anyone. It only fetches public YouTube counts, over an encrypted connection. Wipe it with a button hold before regifting or reselling.

One device, many platforms. Prefer to track something else? Social Meter also counts YouTube, Twitch, Spotify, Bluesky, Mastodon, GitHub, npm, Docker Hub, Discord, Steam, Shopify, Etsy and Reddit — just pick your platform at setup.

The YouTube Subscriber Counter is pre-flashed and ready — plug it in, join your Wi-Fi, and watch your subscribers climb.

* Social Meter is an independent hardware project by Encinitas 3D. YouTube is a trademark of Google LLC; this product is not made by, endorsed by, or affiliated with YouTube or Google LLC.
